# Prompt 016: Notes - Unlinked Mentions (P1)

## Objective
Implement unlinked mentions detection to automatically find implicit connections between notes, completing the bidirectional linking system.

## Context
- **Feature:** Notes - Bidirectional Linking (P1)
- **Current State:** Backlinks panel shows explicit [[wiki links]], broken link detection complete
- **P1 Gap:** No unlinked mentions section showing implicit references
- **Priority:** HIGH IMPACT - Discovers hidden connections, reduces manual linking burden

## Requirements

### Unlinked Mentions Detection
**Purpose:** Find mentions of note titles in note content where no [[wiki link]] exists

**Implementation:**
- Search note content for exact title matches (case-insensitive)
- Exclude existing [[wiki links]] from results
- Show context snippets (50 chars before/after mention)
- Limit to 20 results for performance
- Real-time updates when notes created/deleted/renamed

**UI:**
- Add "Unlinked Mentions" collapsible section in BacklinksPanel
- Display: Note title + context snippet + click to navigate
- Option to "Link" (converts text to [[wiki link]])
- Gray/muted styling to differentiate from explicit backlinks

**Edge Cases:**
- Case-insensitive matching
- Ignore matches inside code blocks
- Ignore matches in URLs
- Handle special characters in note titles
- Performance: Only search visible notes (lazy load if needed)

## Files to Create

### Utils
**`src/utils/unlinkedMentions.ts`**
```typescript
export function findUnlinkedMentions(
  targetNoteTitle: string,
  allNotes: Note[],
  excludeNoteId: string
): UnlinkedMention[]

export interface UnlinkedMention {
  noteId: string;
  noteTitle: string;
  snippet: string; // Context around mention
  position: number; // Character offset in content
}
```

## Files to Modify

### Components
**`src/components/BacklinksPanel.tsx`**
- Import `findUnlinkedMentions`
- Add collapsible "Unlinked Mentions" section below backlinks
- Show count (e.g., "Unlinked Mentions (5)")
- Render UnlinkedMention list with context snippets
- Add "Link" button to convert text to [[wiki link]]

### Stores
**`src/stores/useNotesStore.ts`**
- Add action: `convertToWikiLink(noteId, position, targetTitle)`
- Updates note content: replaces text with [[wiki link]] at position
- Triggers re-render of unlinked mentions

## Implementation Approach

### Phase 1: Detection Logic
1. Create `unlinkedMentions.ts` utility
2. Implement exact title matching with case-insensitive search
3. Extract context snippets (50 chars before/after)
4. Filter out existing [[wiki links]]
5. Limit results to 20 for performance

### Phase 2: UI Integration
1. Update BacklinksPanel with new section
2. Add collapsible UI (default: collapsed)
3. Style unlinked mentions differently from backlinks
4. Add "Link" button with onClick handler

### Phase 3: Conversion Action
1. Add `convertToWikiLink` action to useNotesStore
2. Find exact text match at position
3. Replace with [[wiki link]] syntax
4. Update note content in store
5. Re-run unlinked mentions detection

## Verification
1. Create note "Project Alpha"
2. Create another note with text "working on Project Alpha today"
3. Open "Project Alpha" note
4. Verify unlinked mentions section shows the reference
5. Click "Link" button
6. Verify text converts to [[Project Alpha]]
7. Verify unlinked mention disappears (now a backlink)
8. Test edge cases:
   - Case variations: "project alpha", "PROJECT ALPHA"
   - Partial matches don't trigger (e.g., "Project" alone)
   - Mentions in code blocks ignored
   - Performance with 100+ notes

## Success Criteria
- ✅ Unlinked mentions detected accurately
- ✅ Context snippets show 50 chars before/after
- ✅ Click to navigate works
- ✅ "Link" button converts text to [[wiki link]]
- ✅ Real-time updates when notes change
- ✅ Performance <100ms for 100 notes
- ✅ UI components follow semantic token patterns
- ✅ Type safety maintained throughout

## Non-negotiables
- Use Tailwind semantic tokens (no hardcoded colors)
- TypeScript strict mode compliance
- Performance limit: 20 results max
- Case-insensitive matching
- Exclude code blocks from detection
- Follow CLAUDE.md patterns (stores, components, types)

## Related Files
- `src/utils/backlinks.ts` - Backlinks detection (reference for pattern)
- `src/components/BacklinksPanel.tsx` - Backlinks UI (extend with unlinked)
- `src/stores/useNotesStore.ts` - Notes store
- `src/types/notes.ts` - Types

## Estimated Complexity
**Low-Medium** - String matching and UI extension. Main complexity is performance optimization and edge case handling.
